expressions.name: _fn_ConvertCatalog
expressions.expression:
let 
    Source = (catalog as any) => let 
    Source = catalog, 
    ConvertToTable = #table(1, {{Source}}), 
    Split = Table.SplitColumn(ConvertToTable, "Column1", Splitter.SplitTextByEachDelimiter({"_"}, QuoteStyle.Csv, true), {"Catalog"}), 
    AddEnv = Table.ReplaceValue(Split, each [Catalog], each [Catalog] & _DbxEnvironmentSuffix,Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Catalog"}), 
    ConvertToValue = List.Max(AddEnv[Catalog]) 
in 
    ConvertToValue 
in 
Source

expressions.name: _fn_GetDataFromDBX
expressions.expression:
let 
    func = (_DbxCatalog as text, _DbxDatabase as text, _DbxTable as text) => let 
        Source = Databricks.Catalogs(_DbxServer, _DbxEndpoint, []), 
        catalog_Database = Source{[Name=_fn_ConvertCatalog(_DbxCatalog),Kind="Database"]}[Data], 
        default_Schema = catalog_Database{[Name=_DbxDatabase,Kind="Schema"]}[Data], 
        Table = default_Schema{[Name=_DbxTable,Kind="Table"]}[Data] 
    in 
        Table 
in 
    func

Avg Weekly Net Retail Sales Value LW (Physical Returns) (Saleable NRSVP Cover)
Avg Weekly Net Retail Sales Value LW (Physical Returns) (Tradeable NRSVP Cover)
Avg Weekly Retail Sales Buy Value (Saleable BV Cover)
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentWeek = SELECTEDVALUE('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])

VAR WeekAvg =
    VAR DaysThisWeek = FILTER(ALL('Date'), 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek)
    VAR ValidDays = FILTER(
        ADDCOLUMNS(
            DaysThisWeek,
            "Sales", CALCULATE([Retail Sales Buy Value]),
            "Stock", CALCULATE([Saleable Stock Buy Value])
        ),
        [Stock] > 0
    )
    VAR TotalSales = SUMX(ValidDays, [Sales])
    VAR ActiveDays = COUNTROWS(ValidDays)
    RETURN DIVIDE(TotalSales, ActiveDays)

VAR AllWeekAvgs =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
        VALUES('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]),
        "WeekAvg",
        VAR WeekId = 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id]
        VAR WeekDays = FILTER(ALL('Date'), 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = WeekId)
        VAR ValidDays = FILTER(
            ADDCOLUMNS(
                WeekDays,
                "Sales", CALCULATE([Retail Sales Buy Value]),
                "Stock", CALCULATE([Saleable Stock Buy Value])
            ),
            [Stock] > 0
        )
        VAR TotalSales = SUMX(ValidDays, [Sales])
        VAR ActiveDays = COUNTROWS(ValidDays)
        RETURN DIVIDE(TotalSales, ActiveDays)
    )

VAR ResultWhenTotal = AVERAGEX(AllWeekAvgs, [WeekAvg])

RETURN IF(ISBLANK(CurrentWeek), ResultWhenTotal, WeekAvg)

measures.name: Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value - MTD
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
            [Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value],
             FILTER(
                     ALL('Date'),
                     'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = SELECTEDVALUE('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) && 
                                              'Date'[Calendar Date] <= MAX('Date'[Calendar Date]) 
                          )
               )

measures.name: Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value - Prior Month
measures.expression:
VAR sub = 
           IF(     // if the selected financial month is not January
                SELECTEDVALUE('Date'[Financial Month Id]) <> 1,
                 1, //substracts one from selected month ID
                 89 //substracts 89 from selected month ID when moving from a year to previous year, i.e. 202601 to 202512
                    )
                  VAR dt = MIN('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) - sub
                   //prior month to current month, to be used when the metric is used on its own with date filter
                   VAR prior_current_fin_month = CALCULATE(MIN('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]),FILTER('Date', 'Date'[Calendar Date] = TODAY())) - sub
                   VAR result =
                                IF(
                                     ISFILTERED('Date'),
                                     CALCULATE(
                                         [Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value],
                                         FILTER(ALL('Date'), 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = dt )
                                                  ),
                                       CALCULATE(
                                         [Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value],
                                            FILTER(ALL('Date'), 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = prior_current_fin_month)
                                                              )
                                                 )
RETURN result

measures.name: Closing Tradeable Stock Buy Value
Commitment Buy Value Ex Tax
measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate         = TODAY()
VAR YesterdayDate     = TodayDate - 1
VAR CurrentRowDate    = MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR SelectedDates     = VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR SelectedMaxDate   = MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasAnyDateFilter  = ISFILTERED('Date')
VAR IsTodayInFilter   = CONTAINS(SelectedDates, 'Date'[Calendar Date], TodayDate)

VAR TargetDate =
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        HasAnyDateFilter && IsTodayInFilter,  YesterdayDate,
        HasAnyDateFilter,                     SelectedMaxDate,
                                              YesterdayDate
    )

RETURN
IF(
    CurrentRowDate = TodayDate,
    BLANK(),
    CALCULATE(
        SUM('Daily Trade'[Commitment Buy Value Ex Tax]),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] = TargetDate
    )
)

measures.name: Commitment Buy Value Yesterday
measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate = TODAY()
VAR YesterdayDate = TodayDate - 1

VAR SelectedDates =
    VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR MaxSelectedDate =
    MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR IsTodayInFilter =
    CONTAINS (
        SelectedDates,
        'Date'[Calendar Date],
        TodayDate
    )

VAR SnapshotDate =
    IF (
        IsTodayInFilter,
        YesterdayDate,
        MaxSelectedDate
    )

VAR SnapshotDateYesterday =
    CALCULATE (
        MAX ( 'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Yesterday] ),
        FILTER (
            ALL ( 'Daily Financial Transform' ),
            'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] = SnapshotDate
        )
    )

RETURN
IF (
    ISBLANK ( SnapshotDateYesterday ),
    BLANK (),
    CALCULATE (
        SUM ( 'Daily Trade'[Commitment Buy Value] ),
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' ),
        TREATAS (
            { SnapshotDateYesterday },
            'Date'[Calendar Date]
        )
    )
)

measures.name: Days Since Earliest Go Live Date
measures.expression:
VAR LaunchDate =
   SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date])
/*VAR EndDate =
   MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date])*/
VAR EndDate = IF (
                  ISINSCOPE( 'Date'[Calendar Date]),
                 MAX('Date'[Calendar Date]),
                TODAY() -1
               ) 
RETURN
IF (
   NOT ISBLANK ( LaunchDate ) 
   && EndDate >= LaunchDate,
   DATEDIFF ( LaunchDate, EndDate, DAY )
)

measures.name: Days in Stock LTD > 0 Unit
measures.expression:
VAR GoLiveRaw = MIN('Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date])
VAR GoLive = DATE(YEAR(GoLiveRaw), MONTH (GoLiveRaw), DAY(GoLiveRaw))
VAR IsInvalidGoLiveDate = ISBLANK(GoLive) || Year(GoLive) = 9999
VAR InStockOnThisDate = CALCULATE ([Stock Units]) > 0
VAR EndDateRaw = MAX ('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR EndDate =  DATE(YEAR(EndDateRaw), MONTH (EndDateRaw), DAY(EndDateRaw))
RETURN
IF (
   IsInvalidGoLiveDate || NOT InStockOnThisDate,
   BLANK(),
   COUNTROWS (
       FILTER (
           ALL('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            'Date'[Calendar Date] >= GoLive
            && 'Date'[Calendar Date] <= EndDate
            && CALCULATE ( [Stock Units] ) > 0
       )
   )
)

measures.name: ELC Intake Mix %
measures.expression:
VAR _isGrandTotal =
    NOT ISINSCOPE(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group])
    && NOT ISINSCOPE(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
VAR _lyBV = [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax LY]
VAR _tyTotal =
    CALCULATE(
        [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax],
        ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
        ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
    )
VAR _originalRate =
    DIVIDE(
        [ELC Intake Margin % vs LY] * [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax],
        _tyTotal
    )
VAR _lyPct =
    DIVIDE(
        _lyBV,
        CALCULATE(
            [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax LY],
            ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
            ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
        )
    )
VAR _projected = _lyPct * _tyTotal
VAR _marginDiffLY =
    [ELC Intake Margin % LY]
        - CALCULATE(
            [ELC Intake Margin % LY],
            ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
            ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
        )
VAR _originalMix =
    DIVIDE(
        ( [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax] - _projected ) * _marginDiffLY,
        _tyTotal
    )
VAR _segmentResult = _originalMix + IF( _lyBV = 0 || ISBLANK(_lyBV), _originalRate, 0 )
RETURN
IF(
    NOT _isGrandTotal,
    _segmentResult,
    SUMX(
        VALUES(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
        VAR _ly = [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax LY]
        VAR _tTotal = CALCULATE( [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) )
        VAR _rateOrig = DIVIDE( [ELC Intake Margin % vs LY] * [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax], _tTotal )
        VAR _lPct = DIVIDE( _ly, CALCULATE( [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax LY], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) ) )
        VAR _proj = _lPct * _tTotal
        VAR _mDiff = [ELC Intake Margin % LY] - CALCULATE( [ELC Intake Margin % LY], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) )
        VAR _mixOrig = DIVIDE( ( [Intake Buy Value Ex Tax] - _proj ) * _mDiff, _tTotal )
        RETURN _mixOrig + IF( _ly = 0 || ISBLANK(_ly), _rateOrig, 0 )
    )
)

measures.name: Forecasted Cover (Weeks)
measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate =
    TODAY()

VAR MaxSelectedDate =
    MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR AnchorDate =
    IF (
        MaxSelectedDate >= TodayDate,
        TodayDate - 1,
        MaxSelectedDate
    )

VAR ForecastedSalesUnits =
    CALCULATE (
        SUM ( 'Daily Trade'[Retail Sale Quantity] ),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] = AnchorDate
    ) * 7

VAR ForecastedTradeableStockUnits =
    ( [Tradeable Stock Units YD] + [Commitment Quantity] )
        - ForecastedSalesUnits

RETURN
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        ForecastedTradeableStockUnits <= 0, 0,
        ForecastedSalesUnits = 0, ForecastedTradeableStockUnits,
        DIVIDE (
            ForecastedTradeableStockUnits,
            ForecastedSalesUnits,
            BLANK ()
        )
    )

measures.name: Intake Units WTD
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),

    HasDate,
        SUMX(
            VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
            RETURN
                CALCULATE(
                    [Intake Units],
                    FILTER(
                        ALL('Date'),
                        'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
                        'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate
                    )
                )
        ),

    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE(
            [Intake Units],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE(
            [Intake Units],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE(
            [Intake Units],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE(
            [Intake Units],
            'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
            'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
        ),

    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE(
            [Intake Units],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        )
)

            'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates

        [Intake Units],

measures.name: Option Count (Sales>0 OR Tradeable Stock Units>0)
measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate         = TODAY()
VAR YesterdayDate     = TodayDate - 1
VAR CurrentRowDate    = MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR SelectedDates     = VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR SelectedMaxDate   = MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasAnyDateFilter  = ISFILTERED('Date')
VAR IsTodayInFilter   = CONTAINS(SelectedDates, 'Date'[Calendar Date], TodayDate)

VAR TargetDate =
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        HasAnyDateFilter && IsTodayInFilter,  YesterdayDate,
        HasAnyDateFilter,                     SelectedMaxDate,
                                              YesterdayDate
    )

VAR OptionsWithSales =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        VALUES('Daily Trade'[Dim Product Option Sk]),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] = TargetDate,
        'Daily Trade'[Retail Sale Quantity] > 0
    )

VAR OptionsWithTradeableStock =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        VALUES('Daily Trade'[Dim Product Option Sk]),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] = TargetDate,
        'Inventory Status'[Inventory Status Subgroup Id] = 3,
        'Daily Trade'[Stock Quantity] > 0
    )

RETURN
IF(
    CurrentRowDate = TodayDate,
    BLANK(),
    COUNTROWS(DISTINCT(UNION(OptionsWithSales, OptionsWithTradeableStock)))
)

VAR FilteredDates =

        UNION (
            ALLSELECTED ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            ALL ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )
        ),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] IN ALLSELECTED ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )
            || NOT ISFILTERED ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )
    )
 
VAR TnR =
    SELECTCOLUMNS (
        CALCULATETABLE (
            VALUES ( Option ),
            'UDA'[Priority] = "Test & React"
        ),
        "Option ID", Option[Dim Product Option Sk],
        "Option Description", Option[Option Description]
    )
 
VAR TnR_desc =
    SELECTCOLUMNS ( TnR, "Option Description", [Option Description] )
 
VAR React_repeat =
    SELECTCOLUMNS (
        CALCULATETABLE (
            VALUES ( Option ),
            'UDA'[Priority] = "React",
            'Option'[Option Description] IN TnR_desc
        ),
        "Option ID", Option[Dim Product Option Sk],
        "Option Description", Option[Option Description]
    )
 
VAR Test =
    SELECTCOLUMNS (
        CALCULATETABLE (
            VALUES ( Option ),
            'UDA'[Priority] = "Test"
        ),
        "Option ID", Option[Dim Product Option Sk],
        "Option Description", Option[Option Description]
    )
 
VAR TnR_300 =
    FILTER (
        ADDCOLUMNS (
            TnR,
            "GoLive",
                CALCULATE (
                    MIN ( 'Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date] )
                ),
            "Commitment", [Commitment Quantity],
            "Intake",
                CALCULATE (
                    [Intake Units],
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' )
                )
        ),
        [Commitment] + [Intake] > 300
&& NOT ISBLANK ( [GoLive] )
&& [GoLive] IN FilteredDates
    )
 
VAR Tnr_50 =
    FILTER (
        ADDCOLUMNS (
            TnR,
            "GoLive",
                CALCULATE (
                    MIN ( 'Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date] )
                ),
            "Commitment", [Commitment Quantity],
            "Intake",
                CALCULATE (
                    [Intake Units],
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' )
                )
        ),
        [Intake] > 50
&& NOT ISBLANK ( [GoLive] )
&& [GoLive] IN FilteredDates
    )
 
VAR ReactRepeat_300 =
    FILTER (
        ADDCOLUMNS (
            React_repeat,
            "GoLive",
                CALCULATE (
                    MIN ( 'Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date] )
                ),
            "Commitment", [Commitment Quantity],
            "Intake",
                CALCULATE (
                    [Intake Units],
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' )
                )
        ),
        [Commitment] + [Intake] > 300
&& NOT ISBLANK ( [GoLive] )
&& [GoLive] IN FilteredDates
    )
 
VAR Test_300 =
    FILTER (
        ADDCOLUMNS (
            Test,
            "GoLive",
                CALCULATE (
                    MIN ( 'Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date] )
                ),
            "Commitment", [Commitment Quantity],
            "Intake",
                CALCULATE (
                    [Intake Units],
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' )
                )
        ),
        [Commitment] + [Intake] > 300
&& NOT ISBLANK ( [GoLive] )
&& [GoLive] IN FilteredDates
    )
 
VAR Test_50 =
    FILTER (
        ADDCOLUMNS (
            Test,
            "GoLive",
                CALCULATE (
                    MIN ( 'Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date] )
                ),
            "Commitment", [Commitment Quantity],
            "Intake",
                CALCULATE (
                    [Intake Units],
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
                    REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' )
                )
        ),
        [Intake] > 50
&& NOT ISBLANK ( [GoLive] )
&& [GoLive] IN FilteredDates
    )
 
VAR repeats =
    COUNTROWS (
        FILTER (
            UNION ( TnR_300, ReactRepeat_300, Test_300 ),
            [GoLive] <> DATE ( 9999, 12, 31 )
        )
    )
 
VAR test_tnr =
    COUNTROWS (
        FILTER (
            UNION ( Tnr_50, Test_50 ),
            [GoLive] <> DATE ( 9999, 12, 31 )
        )
    )
 
RETURN
DIVIDE ( repeats, test_tnr, 0 )

measures.name: React Hit Rate Dynamic Week%
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedLWTable =
    VALUES ( 'LW Slicer'[LW] )

VAR CountSelected =
    COUNTROWS ( SelectedLWTable )

VAR AnchorDate =
    MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR AnchorWeek =
    CALCULATE (
        MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] = AnchorDate,
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' )
    )

VAR GetOffset =
    VAR Label = SELECTEDVALUE ( 'LW Slicer'[LW] )
    RETURN
        IF (
            Label = "LW" || ISBLANK ( Label ),
            1,
            VAR NumText = SUBSTITUTE ( Label, "LW-", "" )
            RETURN IF ( ISNUMBER ( VALUE ( NumText ) ), VALUE ( NumText ) + 1, 1 )
        )
VAR SingleWeekToShow =
    AnchorWeek - GetOffset

VAR SingleResult =
    CALCULATE (
        [React Hit Rate %],
        'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = SingleWeekToShow,
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' )
    )

VAR MultiResult =
    AVERAGEX (
        SelectedLWTable,
        VAR Label = 'LW Slicer'[LW]
        VAR Offset =
            IF (
                Label = "LW" || ISBLANK ( Label ),
                1,
                VAR NumText = SUBSTITUTE ( Label, "LW-", "" )
                RETURN IF ( ISNUMBER ( VALUE ( NumText ) ), VALUE ( NumText ) + 1, 1 )
            )
        VAR WeekToShow =
            AnchorWeek - Offset
        RETURN
            CALCULATE (
                [React Hit Rate %],
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = WeekToShow,
                REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
                REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' )
            )
    )

RETURN
IF ( CountSelected = 1, SingleResult, MultiResult )

measures.name: Retail Physical Return Quantity WTD
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),

    HasDate,
        SUMX(
            VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
            RETURN
                CALCULATE(
                    [Retail Physical Return Quantity],
                    FILTER(
                        ALL('Date'),
                        'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
                        'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate
                    )
                )
        ),

    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Physical Return Quantity],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Physical Return Quantity],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE(

            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Physical Return Quantity],
            'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
            'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])

    HasFinYear,

                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&

)

measures.name: Retail Return Value WTD
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),

    HasDate,
        SUMX(
            VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
            RETURN
                CALCULATE(
                    [Retail Return Value],
                    FILTER(
                        ALL('Date'),
                        'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
                        'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate
                    )
                )
        ),

    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Return Value],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Return Value],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Return Value],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Return Value],
            'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
            'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
        ),

    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Return Value],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Buy Value Mix Unit Cost %
measures.expression:
VAR _isGrandTotal =
    NOT ISINSCOPE(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group])
    && NOT ISINSCOPE(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
VAR _lyBV = [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax LY]
VAR _tyTotal =
    CALCULATE(
        [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax],
        ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
        ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
    )
VAR _originalRate =
    DIVIDE(
        [Retail Sales Unit Cost Margin % vs LY] * [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax],
        _tyTotal
    )
VAR _lyPct =
    DIVIDE(
        _lyBV,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax LY],
            ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
            ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
        )
    )
VAR _projected = _lyPct * _tyTotal
VAR _marginDiffLY =
    [Retail Sales Unit Cost Margin % LY]
        - CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Unit Cost Margin % LY],
            ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
            ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
        )
VAR _originalMix =
    DIVIDE(
        ( [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax] - _projected ) * _marginDiffLY,
        _tyTotal
    )
VAR _segmentResult = _originalMix + IF( _lyBV = 0 || ISBLANK(_lyBV), _originalRate, 0 )
RETURN
IF(
    NOT _isGrandTotal,
    _segmentResult,
    SUMX(
        VALUES(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
        VAR _ly = [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax LY]
        VAR _tTotal = CALCULATE( [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) )
        VAR _rateOrig = DIVIDE( [Retail Sales Unit Cost Margin % vs LY] * [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax], _tTotal )
        VAR _lPct = DIVIDE( _ly, CALCULATE( [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax LY], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) ) )
        VAR _proj = _lPct * _tTotal
        VAR _mDiff = [Retail Sales Unit Cost Margin % LY] - CALCULATE( [Retail Sales Unit Cost Margin % LY], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) )
        VAR _mixOrig = DIVIDE( ( [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax] - _proj ) * _mDiff, _tTotal )
        RETURN _mixOrig + IF( _ly = 0 || ISBLANK(_ly), _rateOrig, 0 )
    )
)

measures.expression:
VAR _isGrandTotal =

        )
VAR _originalMix =

VAR _segmentResult = _originalMix + IF( _lyBV = 0 || ISBLANK(_lyBV), _originalRate, 0 )

        VAR _ly = [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax LY]
        VAR _tTotal = CALCULATE( [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) )
        VAR _rateOrig = DIVIDE( [Retail Sales WAC Margin % vs LY] * [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax], _tTotal )
        VAR _lPct = DIVIDE( _ly, CALCULATE( [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax LY], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) ) )
        VAR _proj = _lPct * _tTotal
        VAR _mDiff = [Retail Sales WAC Margin % LY] - CALCULATE( [Retail Sales WAC Margin % LY], ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]), ALLSELECTED(Option[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]) )
        VAR _mixOrig = DIVIDE( ( [Retail Sales Buy Value Exc Tax] - _proj ) * _mDiff, _tTotal )
        RETURN _mixOrig + IF( _ly = 0 || ISBLANK(_ly), _rateOrig, 0 )
    )
)

VAR SelectedLW =
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'LW Slicer'[LW], "LW" )

    SWITCH (
        SelectedLW,

        "LW-5", 6,
        "LW-6", 7,
        "LW-7", 8,
        "LW-8", 9,

        MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ),

RETURN

    'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = WeekToShow,
    REMOVEFILTERS ('Date'),
    REMOVEFILTERS ('Time Period')
)

VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),

    HasDate,
        SUMX(
            VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
            RETURN
                CALCULATE(
                    [Retail Sales Quantity],
                    FILTER(
                        ALL('Date'),
                        'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
                        'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate
                    )
                )
        ),

    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
            'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
        ),

    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Units Coversion % LY
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    HasDate,
        SUMX(
            VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LYDate = IF(
                NOT ISBLANK(CurrentDate),
                DATE(YEAR(CurrentDate) - 1, MONTH(CurrentDate), DAY(CurrentDate))
            )
            RETURN
                IF(
                    NOT ISBLANK(LYDate),
                    CALCULATE(
         [Retail Sales Units Coversion %],
                        FILTER(
                            ALL('Date'),
                            'Date'[Calendar Date] = LYDate
                        )
                    )
                )
        ),
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE(
[Retail Sales Units Coversion %],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]) - 100
            )
        ),
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE(
[Retail Sales Units Coversion %],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) - 100
             )
        ),
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE(
[Retail Sales Units Coversion %],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) - 100
            )
        ),
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE(
[Retail Sales Units Coversion %],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) - 100
            )
        ),
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE(
[Retail Sales Units Coversion %],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) - 1
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Value OB LM
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])

RETURN
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    // Calendar Date → shift by -1 month
    HasDate,
        SUMX (
            VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LMDate =
                IF (
                    NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentDate ),
                    EOMONTH ( CurrentDate, -1 ) + DAY ( CurrentDate )
                )
            RETURN
                CALCULATE (
                    [Retail Sales Value OB],
                    FILTER ( ALL ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = LMDate )
                )
        ),

    // Financial Week → subtract ~4 weeks (28 days)
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value OB],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ) - 4
            )
        ),

    // Financial Month → previous month
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value OB],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Quarter → last quarter (unchanged)
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value OB],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Half → last half (unchanged)
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value OB],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Year → last year (unchanged)
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value OB],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year] ) - 1
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Value OB
Retail Sales Value T&R LM
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])

RETURN
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    // Calendar Date → shift by -1 month
    HasDate,
        SUMX (
            VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LMDate =
                IF (
                    NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentDate ),
                    EOMONTH ( CurrentDate, -1 ) + DAY ( CurrentDate )
                )
            RETURN
                CALCULATE (
                   [Retail Sales Value T&R] ,
                    FILTER ( ALL ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = LMDate )
                )
        ),

    // Financial Week → subtract ~4 weeks (28 days)
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value T&R],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ) - 4
            )
        ),

    // Financial Month → previous month
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value T&R],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Quarter → last quarter (unchanged)
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value T&R],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Half → last half (unchanged)
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value T&R],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Year → last year (unchanged)
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value T&R],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year] ) - 1
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Value WTD
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),

    HasDate,
        SUMX(
            VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
            RETURN
                CALCULATE(
                    [Retail Sales Value],
                    FILTER(
                        ALL('Date'),
                        'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
                        'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate
                    )
                )
        ),

    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),

    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Value],
            'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
            'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
        ),

    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER(
                ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        )
)

            REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' ),

    )

measures.name: Sales Units LTD
measures.expression:
VAR GoLiveRaw =
    MIN ( 'Option'[Option Earliest Global Go live date] )
VAR GoLiveDate =
    DATE ( YEAR ( GoLiveRaw ), MONTH ( GoLiveRaw ), DAY ( GoLiveRaw ) )
VAR IsInvalidGoLiveDate =
    ISBLANK ( GoLiveDate ) || YEAR ( GoLiveDate ) = 9999
VAR EndDateRaw =
    MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )
VAR EndDate =
    DATE ( YEAR ( EndDateRaw ), MONTH ( EndDateRaw ), DAY ( EndDateRaw ) )
RETURN
    IF (
        IsInvalidGoLiveDate,
        BLANK (),
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' ),
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Calendar Date] >= GoLiveDate && 
                'Date'[Calendar Date] <= EndDate
            )
        )
    )

measures.name: Total Retail Sales Buy Value - Prior Month
measures.expression:
VAR sub = 
             IF(     // if the selected financial month is not January
                                    SELECTEDVALUE('Date'[Financial Month Id]) <> 1,
                                    1, //substracts one from selected month ID
                                    89 //substracts 89 from selected month ID when moving from a year to previous year, i.e. 202601 to 202512
                                  )
                    VAR dt = MIN('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) - sub
                    //prior month to current month, to be used when the metric is used on its own with date filter
                    VAR prior_current_fin_month = CALCULATE(MIN('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]),FILTER('Date', 'Date'[Calendar Date] = TODAY())) - sub
                    VAR result =       IF(
                                            ISFILTERED('Date'),
                                     CALCULATE(
                                         [Total Retail Sales Buy Value],
                                                FILTER(ALL('Date'), 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = dt )
                                                          ),
                                       CALCULATE(
                                         [Total Retail Sales Buy Value],
                                            FILTER(ALL('Date'), 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = prior_current_fin_month)
                                                              )
                                                 )
RETURN result

        'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates)
RETURN
IF(
    ISEMPTY(LYDates),
    BLANK(),
    CALCULATE(
        [VA %],
        REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
        REMOVEFILTERS('Time Period'),
        'Date'[Calendar date] IN LYDates
    )
)

VAR LaunchDate =

)

tables.name: Option Ranking
partitionExpressions:
let
    DbxEnvironmentSuffixText =
        if _DbxEnvironmentSuffix = null then "" else Text.From(_DbxEnvironmentSuffix),

    Source =
        Value.NativeQuery(
            Databricks.Catalogs(
                _DbxServer,
                _DbxEndpoint,
                [
                    Catalog = "product" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText,
                    Database = null,
                    QueryTags = null,
                    EnableAutomaticProxyDiscovery = null,
                    Implementation = "2.0"
                ]
            ){[Name="product", Kind="Database"]}[Data],
            "WITH#(lf)" &
            "  retail_sale_qty_top as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Retail Sales Quantity' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Top' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_quantity) as  VAL#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_quantity) DESC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "   retail_sale_qty_bottom as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Retail Sales Quantity' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Bottom' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_quantity) as VAL#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_quantity) ASC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "  retail_sale_value_top as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Retail Sales Value' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Top' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_value) as  VAL#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_value) DESC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "   retail_sale_value_bottom as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Retail Sales Value' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Bottom' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_value) as val#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_value) ASC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "  avg_sell_price_top as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Average Selling Price' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Top' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_value)/SUM(retail_sale_quantity) AS VAL#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_value)/SUM(retail_sale_quantity) DESC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "   avg_sell_price_bottom as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Average Selling Price' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Bottom' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_value)/SUM(retail_sale_quantity) AS VAL#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_value)/SUM(retail_sale_quantity) ASC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "  retail_return_value_top as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Retail Return Rate Value %' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Top' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_return_value)/SUM(retail_sale_value) as  VAL#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_return_value)/SUM(retail_sale_value) DESC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "   retail_return_value_bottom as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Retail Return Rate Value %' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Bottom' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_return_value)/SUM(retail_sale_value) as val#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_return_value)/SUM(retail_sale_value) ASC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "  st_top as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Net Sell Through Units %' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Top' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_quantity-retail_return_quantity)/SUM(intake_quantity) as val#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_quantity-retail_return_quantity)/SUM(intake_quantity) DESC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "   st_bottom as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Net Sell Through Units %' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Bottom' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_quantity-retail_return_quantity)/sum(intake_quantity) as val#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_quantity-retail_return_quantity)/sum(intake_quantity) ASC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "#(lf)" &
            "  conversion_top as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Conversion' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Top' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_quantity)/SUM(view_count) as val#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_quantity)/SUM(view_count) DESC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "   conversion_bottom as (#(lf)" &
            "    select#(lf)" &
            "      dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Conversion' AS selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "      ,'Bottom' AS sorting#(lf)" &
            "      ,SUM(retail_sale_quantity)/sum(view_count) as val#(lf)" &
            "      ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(retail_sale_quantity)/sum(view_count) ASC) as INDEX#(lf)" &
            "    from sales" & DbxEnvironmentSuffixText & ".serve.fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1#(lf)" &
            "    where dim_date_sk = date_add(current_date(), -1)#(lf)" &
            "    group by dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    having val > 0#(lf)" &
            "    order by index asc#(lf)" &
            "    limit 1000#(lf)" &
            "  ),#(lf)" &
            "#(lf)" &
            "  ranking_table AS (#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM retail_sale_value_top#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM retail_sale_value_bottom#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM retail_sale_qty_top#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM retail_sale_qty_bottom#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM avg_sell_price_top#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM avg_sell_price_bottom#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM retail_return_value_top#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM retail_return_value_bottom#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM st_top#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM st_bottom#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM conversion_top#(lf)" &
            "    UNION ALL#(lf)" &
            "    SELECT * FROM conversion_bottom#(lf)" &
            "  )#(lf)" &
            "#(lf)" &
            "  SELECT DISTINCT#(lf)" &
            "    dim_product_option_sk#(lf)" &
            "    ,selected_metric#(lf)" &
            "    ,sorting#(lf)" &
            "    ,index#(lf)" &
            "  FROM#(lf)" &
            "    ranking_table",
            null,
            [EnableFolding=true]
        )
in
    Source
